title: leucosyke puya
side_effects: Leucosyke puya can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues in some individuals. Ingesting large amounts of the plant's sap or leaves can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap can also cause eye irritation, redness, and blurred vision. Additionally, improper use of the plant may interact with certain medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
